resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def maxScoreSightseeingPair(self, values: List[int]) -> int:
        max_score = float('-inf')
        for i in range(len(values) - 1):
            for j in range(i + 1, len(values)):
                max_score = max(max_score, values[i] + values[j] + i - j)
        return max_score
```
efficiency: MEDIUM
time complexity: O(N^2)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses a nested loop to iterate through all possible pairs of sightseeing spots. It calculates the score for each pair and keeps track of the maximum score found.
